events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May, was born on July 19, 1947, in Hampton, Middlesex, England.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Queen's iconic guitarist Brian May is celebrating his 79th birthday today! What's your favourite May solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: Sir Michael Philip Jagger, frontman of The Rolling Stones, was born on July 26, 1943, in Dartford, Kent.

angles.name: Jagger's Enduring Legacy
angles.copy: The legendary Mick Jagger is 83 today! Still strutting, still singing, still the ultimate rock and roll frontman.

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being the very first music video ever aired.

angles.name: The Day The Music Changed
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' – an ironic start to a revolution that changed music forever.

events.title: Oasis 'Definitely Maybe' anniversary
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, becoming a defining record of the Britpop era.

angles.name: Britpop's Big Bang
angles.copy: It's an anniversary for Oasis's 'Definitely Maybe'! An album that defined a generation and launched a rock and roll phenomenon. Still sounds as fresh today.

events.title: Woodstock Festival 57th anniversary
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music & Art Fair, billed as '3 Days of Peace & Music', took place from August 15-18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: 57 years since half a million gathered for Woodstock! More than just a festival, it was a cultural moment that echoed around the world.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, the 'King of Rock and Roll', passed away on August 16, 1977, at his Graceland home in Memphis, Tennessee. He would have been 91.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley, who left us 49 years ago today. His music and legend live on, forever the King of Rock and Roll.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Jimi Hendrix, widely regarded as one of the greatest guitarists in history, passed away on September 18, 1970. He would have been 84.

angles.name: Guitar God Remembered
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix today. His revolutionary guitar work continues to inspire generations.

events.title: Beatles 'Abbey Road' anniversary
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic 'Abbey Road' album was released in the UK on September 26, 1969, featuring their legendary zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: That Iconic Walk
angles.copy: An anniversary for The Beatles' 'Abbey Road'! That album cover is one of the most famous in history, but what's your favourite track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, was born on September 7, 1951, in Akron, Ohio, USA.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the one and only Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon, still commanding the stage with her incredible talent.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: William John Paul Gallagher, the distinctive voice of Oasis and a prolific solo artist, was born on September 21, 1972, in Manchester, England.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Our kid is 54 today! Happy birthday to Liam Gallagher, the unmistakable voice behind some of Britpop's biggest anthems.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' anniversary
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released in the US on October 11, 1971, becoming a timeless anthem for peace.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: On this day, we reflect on John Lennon's 'Imagine'. Its message of peace and unity resonates just as strongly today.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising how people listened to music.

angles.name: Music In Your Pocket
angles.copy: Can you believe it's 25 years since the first iPod? It transformed music consumption and put thousands of songs in your pocket.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: James Bond Day is celebrated annually on October 5th, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From iconic gadgets to unforgettable theme songs, what's your favourite moment from the 007 universe?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: John Winston Ono Lennon, co-founder of The Beatles and a celebrated solo artist, was born on October 9, 1940, in Liverpool, England.

angles.name: A Visionary Remembered
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message of peace continue to inspire.
